/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/rvc_backend.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/rvc_backend.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvc_backend.dir/src/network/packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvc_backend.dir/src/network/udp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvc_backend.dir/src/rvc/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvc_backend.dir/src/rvc/inferencer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvc_backend.dir/src/rvc/feature_extractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvc_backend.dir/src/rvc/model_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvc_backend.dir/src/api/http_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvc_backend.dir/src/utils/config.cpp.o -o rvc_backend  -lyaml-cpp /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0
